title: Minerrr
description:
Minerrr is an idle/incremental mining game where every click brings you closer to bigger upgrades, stronger workers, and deeper zones.

Break ores by clicking, earn money, scrap, and XP, then spend your resources on upgrades that improve your mining power, worker efficiency, and overall progression. Hire workers to automate mining, unlock new ore types, and push further into new zones.

When progress slows down, make a sacrifice to reset your normal upgrades and gain permanent skill tree bonuses, making every new run faster and stronger than the last.

Mine, upgrade, sacrifice, repeat and grow your mining operation one run at a time.
description_short: Mine ores, earn money, hire workers, buy upgrades, and sacrifice your progress to become stronger every run.
